items.definition_en: A large crab species known for its long legs and sweet meat.
items.example_en: Many people enjoy king crab during special occasions.

items.definition_en: A prized species of tuna valued for its rich flavor.
items.example_en: Bluefin tuna is often used in high-quality sushi.

items.definition_en: A type of white-fleshed tuna used in canned products.
items.example_en: Canned albacore is popular for making sandwiches.

items.definition_en: A large shrimp often used in seafood dishes.
items.example_en: Prawns are served grilled or in pasta.

items.definition_en: A popular fish with tender white flesh.
items.example_en: Sea bream is commonly baked whole with herbs.

items.definition_en: A small oily fish known for its strong flavor.
items.example_en: Smoked mackerel makes a tasty salad addition.

items.definition_en: A fish with firm texture and mild flavor often called 'poor man's lobster.'
items.example_en: Monkfish is delicious when roasted with spices.

items.definition_en: A round marine animal whose orange roe is a delicacy.
items.example_en: Sea urchin is served raw in Japanese cuisine.

items.definition_en: A large fish with a long pointed bill and firm meat.
items.example_en: Swordfish steaks are perfect for grilling.

items.definition_en: Edible marine plants used in soups and sushi.
items.example_en: Seaweed is packed with nutrients and flavor.

items.definition_en: A marine animal similar to squid with a softer body.
items.example_en: Cuttlefish is often served as grilled slices.

items.definition_en: A freshwater fish valued for its tender meat.
items.example_en: Trout is tasty when baked with lemon.

items.definition_en: A large fish with firm white flesh popular in tropical areas.
items.example_en: Grouper is often served as fish fillets in restaurants.

items.definition_en: A freshwater fish with whisker-like barbels around its mouth.
items.example_en: Fried catfish is a Southern specialty.

items.definition_en: A white fish used in many processed seafood products.
items.example_en: Pollock is the main fish in fish sticks.

items.definition_en: A freshwater fish with tender, mild-flavored meat.
items.example_en: Fried perch is a favorite at lakeside cafes.

items.definition_en: A flat fish with white, delicate flesh.
items.example_en: Plaice is popular in European fish and chips.

items.definition_en: Large prawns often used in grilled or fried dishes.
items.example_en: Grilled king prawns are served as a starter.

items.definition_en: A long, narrow shellfish with tender white meat.
items.example_en: Razor clam can be cooked with garlic and parsley.

items.definition_en: A general term for fish with white, mild flesh.
items.example_en: Smoked whitefish is used in many traditional spreads.
